event_definitions.hackathon: A high-intensity competition where students build a working prototype or software solution in 24-48 hours. Focus: Coding, Innovation, and Teamwork. XP Value: Very High (500-1000).
event_definitions.symposium: A technical fest consisting of multiple events like paper presentations, technical quizzes, and coding rounds. Focus: Knowledge Sharing and Networking. XP Value: High (200-500).
event_definitions.workshop: A hands-on learning session led by experts to teach a specific skill (e.g., AI, Robotics, Flutter). Focus: Skill Acquisition. XP Value: Medium (100-300).
event_definitions.paper_presentation: Presenting original research or technical reviews before a panel of experts. Focus: Research, Communication, and Depth. XP Value: High (300-600).
event_definitions.cultural_fest: Non-technical events focusing on arts, dance, and music. Focus: Soft Skills and Community. XP Value: Low (50-100).

gsp_mechanics.xp_system: Students earn XP by attending events. 1000 XP levels them up. High XP unlocks 'Gold' status and premium job roadmaps.
gsp_mechanics.guilds: Teams of students who aggregate points. Winning a 'Guild Battle' gives a 2x XP multiplier to all members.
gsp_mechanics.rag_enabled: The AI uses 'Retrieval Augmented Generation' to pull LIVE events from Unstop and Knowafest in real-time.
gsp_mechanics.career_roadmaps: A 3-step success plan generated by analyzing student interests vs live opportunities.

data_sources.knowafest: Specializes in local college symposiums and workshops in India.
data_sources.unstop: Specializes in national and international hackathons and corporate competitions.
